opening the immersive window

MUS immersive

MUS Immersive is redefining how stories are experienced, building the next generation of immersive storytelling on three core pillars.
‍
Production and immersive adaptation of IP through our internal talent and MUS’ immersive production advisors, reimagining premium content for immersive storytelling.

Distribution & exhibition through our Celeste Immersive Screening Lounge network, creating a new exhibition window for immersive audiences. Efficient transformation and scalable exploitation through our proprietary technology platform, the Celeste Immersive Engine.

Working alongside film studios, sports franchises & leagues, brands, and major media rights holders, MUS immersive enables IP owners to extend the lifecycle, audience & marketing reach, and the monetization of their content through immersive editions & adaptations for full-FOV Celeste Immersive Screening Lounges.

Distribution & Exhibition

MUS immersive’s distribution and exhibition strategy is built on two models: Strategic partnerships and standalone venues, forming a scalable immersive exhibition network.

Our premium Celeste Immersive Screening Lounges deliver exclusive immersive features, branded activations, private events, and premium narrative experiences within luxury lounge environments designed for shared immersive entertainment.

Through strategic partnerships with entertainment properties, sports franchises, and retail destinations, MUS designs, builds, and operates multi-use immersive venues that drive traffic, dwell time, sponsorship activation, and premium entertainment programming.

Powered by the Celeste Immersive Engine, IP and sponsor-driven content can be efficiently transformed and deployed across multiple immersive formats. Our three pillars enable overwhelming content, from narrative features in an anchor auditorium, through live events, interactive experiences, branded environments, and immersive backdrops for performance, sports, and special events. Our internal production, adaptation, and transformation capabilities allow MUS to bring virtually any content, brand vision, or live experience into immersive format, serving multiple purposes across entertainment, marketing, and experiential programming.

Standalone MUS immersive venues are programmed with original content, studio features, revival events, sports programming, and branded immersive experiences, all presented within dedicated immersive auditoriums inside a luxury lounge ecosystem. Immersive releases are eventized across our network, generating audience excitement, extending content lifecycles, creating marketing momentum, and building cultural traction for immersive storytelling as a new exhibition category.

Production & Adaptation

The window ahead is wide open and one that lives in full field-of-view. Our slate spans film, music, sports, and brand collaborations, pushing storytelling beyond the frame and into living environments. The immersive window delivers stories that surround, visuals that overwhelm, and worlds built on a massive immersive theatrical canvas. The audience of the future doesn’t just accept a show, they expect a universe.

MUS | Modern Uprising Studios is building this new medium through partnerships with IP owners, new standards for immersive theatrical release, and a growing network of immersive talent and production advisors, powered by AI tools and the Celeste Immersive Engine. Through original productions, brand activations, and immersive adaptations of prestigious IP, we are defining the next era of entertainment.


Frame Forward Animated AI Film Festival

We’re also the team behind the Frame Forward Festival: A global showcase spotlighting innovative filmmakers, enabled by AI, screened theatrically in the US, and adapted for our immersive venues.

DISCOVER THE FESTIVAL

Celeste Immersive Engine

The Celeste Immersive Engine was developed by MUS’ originating venture engine, veteran-founded Toro Science Corporation. The spatial computing engine was commissioned by the US military to solve a critical problem: Redefine immersive technology for training at scale. From this mission Toro developed Celeste: The proprietary spatial computing engine designed to move beyond traditional VR, delivering high-impact immersive training and storytelling across massive screens, in advanced spatial audio, via purpose-built experiences.

Through multiple awarded development contracts, the military-grade tech evolved rapidly, ultimately breaking free of all headset-based limitations, into shared, high-impact immersive environments.

The Celeste Spatial Computing Engine is the foundation and engine for MUS immersive’s new event cinema window and venue network.

Celeste Immersive Screening Lounges

Starting with MUS immersive’s New York flagship in 2026, Celeste Immersive Screening Lounges will expand nationally in 2027, building the exhibition network for immersive storytelling. Working with leading creatives, brands, studios, franchises, and rights holders, MUS is bringing cinematic and narrative massive immersive to audiences and opening a new event cinema window.

Lounge Model
Premium private screening lounge environments offer exclusive immersive experiences and features, removing transaction and friction within a new theatrical approach.

Toro Science
Venture Engine

more about toro science

Origin Story of MUS immersive
MUS immersive was born out of Toro Science Corporation, a venture studio focused on developing advanced technologies through government partnerships before commercializing them at scale.

Following a multi-year collaboration with the United States Air Force and AFWERX, Toro Science developed the Celeste Spatial Engine to address a critical need in military training: Delivering immersive, high-impact experiences without the limitations of head-mounted devices.
What began as a solution for advanced training evolved rapidly through multiple awarded development efforts, resulting in a breakthrough spatial computing platform capable of transforming standard and AI-generated video into fully navigable 360° environments across large-format displays with integrated spatial audio. As the technology matured, its dual-use potential became clear.

Recognizing a significant opportunity in entertainment and media, Toro Science assembled a team of seasoned film and media executives to launch Modern Uprising Studios as an independent company. This strategic spinout allows MUS to focus on commercial applications, while maintaining ownership to the underlying technology and innovation pipeline.

Today, armed with a battle-tested, military-grade platform and a purpose-built creative team,
MUS immersive | Modern Uprising Studios is positioned to lead the next generation of immersive storytelling and shared cinematic experiences.
